name: The Messiah
overview: The viral video of a Christian pop group made up of several sisters has an enormous effect on the life of Enric, a man tormented by a childhood marked by religious fanaticism and the yoke of a mother with messianic delirium.

trailers.title: La Mesías (The Messiah) | From the Creators of Veneno | English Trailer
Meet the Artist 2024: Javier Calvo and Javier Ambrossi on "La Mesías"
